diagrams.title: Use Case Diagram - Basic Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental elements of a Use Case diagram including actor, use case, system boundary, and association relationship
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic UML Use Case diagram notation and symbols

diagrams.title: Include Relationship
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how to model common behavior extraction using include relationship
elements: Dashed arrow pointing FROM base TO included
diagrams.purpose: Learning when and how to use include relationship to avoid duplication

diagrams.title: Extend Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows how to add optional or conditional behavior using extend relationship
elements: Dashed arrow pointing FROM extending TO base
Extension point shown near base use case
diagrams.purpose: Understanding extend relationship for modeling optional behavior

diagrams.title: Actor Generalization
elements: Child Actors (e.g., Regular Customer, Premium Customer)
Solid arrow with hollow triangle from child to parent
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to model actor hierarchies and inheritance

diagrams.title: Complete Use Case Diagram Example
diagrams.description: Full example showing Online Banking System with multiple use cases and relationships
elements: Use Cases: Login, Transfer Funds, View Balance, Manage Account, Generate Report
Include: Verify Password included in Login
Extend: View Mini Statement extends View Balance
Generalization: Customer generalizes to Business Customer
diagrams.purpose: Comprehensive example showing all relationship types and diagram elements

visuals.title: Scenario Based Modeling
visuals.description: Visual diagram for scenario based modeling
